title: Research Brief
description: Defines the scope and objectives of a client research engagement.

client_id.description: Unique identifier for the client (slug format, e.g. 'acme-corp').

title.description: Short descriptive title of the research brief.

objective.description: Primary research objective — what question should this engagement answer?

background.description: Context and background information for this research engagement.

target_audience.description: The audience or user segment being studied.

research_questions.description: Ordered list of specific research questions to be investigated.

timeline.description: Expected duration or deadline for the engagement (e.g. '4 weeks', '2026-06-30').

created.description: ISO 8601 date the brief was created (YYYY-MM-DD).
